name: Mountain Trekking
desc: Conquer majestic Himalayan trails with expert guides. Includes camping, meals, and safety gear.

name: Family Safari
desc: Spot tigers, elephants, and exotic wildlife in India's finest national parks with family-friendly stays.

name: Wellness Retreat
desc: Rejuvenate your mind and body with yoga, meditation, and Ayurvedic treatments in serene Kerala.

name: Honeymoon Bliss
desc: A dreamy romantic escape across Kerala backwaters, Munnar hills, and a private beach resort.

name: Heritage Trail
desc: Explore India's golden triangle — Delhi, Agra, and Jaipur — with expert heritage guides.

name: Backpacker Special
desc: Budget-friendly adventure through Himachal Pradesh with hostel stays and local food experiences.
